item.title: The YMCA Dance You're Supposed to Do
item.description: Discover the original YMCA dance moves and see how the iconic routine is traditionally performed.

media:content.media:title: The YMCA Dance You're Supposed to Do
media:content.media:description: Discover the original YMCA dance moves and see how the iconic routine is traditionally performed.

item.title: You Don't Need to Shake Seasoning Bottles

media:content.media:title: You Don't Need to Shake Seasoning Bottles

item.title: The Easiest Way to Open Safety Seals
item.description: Learn a simple trick for removing foil safety seals on bottles and containers quickly with less frustration and less mess.

media:content.media:title: The Easiest Way to Open Safety Seals
media:content.media:description: Learn a simple trick for removing foil safety seals on bottles and containers quickly with less frustration and less mess.

item.title: You're Washing Broccoli the Wrong Way
item.description: Learn why rinsing broccoli from the bottom can help water reach between the florets more effectively during cleaning.

media:content.media:title: You're Washing Broccoli the Wrong Way
media:content.media:description: Learn why rinsing broccoli from the bottom can help water reach between the florets more effectively during cleaning.

item.title: How to Use an Air Freshener Correctly
item.description: Learn the intended way to use a common air freshener and how a small adjustment can help it work more effectively.

media:content.media:title: How to Use an Air Freshener Correctly
media:content.media:description: Learn the intended way to use a common air freshener and how a small adjustment can help it work more effectively.

item.title: Roll Your Towel Instead of Tucking It
item.description: Discover why rolling a towel can help it stay in place more securely than simply tucking it after a shower.

media:content.media:title: Roll Your Towel Instead of Tucking It
media:content.media:description: Discover why rolling a towel can help it stay in place more securely than simply tucking it after a shower.

item.title: The Easy Way to Remove Cleaning Gloves
item.description: Learn how a little cold water can make it easier to remove rubber cleaning gloves quickly and comfortably after household chores.

media:content.media:title: The Easy Way to Remove Cleaning Gloves
media:content.media:description: Learn how a little cold water can make it easier to remove rubber cleaning gloves quickly and comfortably after household chores.

item.title: Your Trash Can Has a Hidden Convenience
item.description: Discover a simple way to store an entire roll of trash bags inside many trash cans, keeping replacements within easy reach.

media:content.media:title: Your Trash Can Has a Hidden Convenience
media:content.media:description: Discover a simple way to store an entire roll of trash bags inside many trash cans, keeping replacements within easy reach.

item.title: A Smarter Way to Repot Plants
item.description: Learn a simple planting trick that uses a smaller pot to make transferring plants into larger containers quicker and easier.

media:content.media:title: A Smarter Way to Repot Plants
media:content.media:description: Learn a simple planting trick that uses a smaller pot to make transferring plants into larger containers quicker and easier.

item.title: Never Plug a Surge Protector Into Another One
item.description: Learn why plugging one surge protector into another is generally not recommended and what to do instead for safer power distribution.

media:content.media:title: Never Plug a Surge Protector Into Another One
media:content.media:description: Learn why plugging one surge protector into another is generally not recommended and what to do instead for safer power distribution.
